overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a rainy evening drive through Night City outskirts. The player navigates highways and urban roads, executes a U-turn maneuver in a parking area, and enters a tunnel, with persistent rain and a neon-lit futuristic dashboard visible throughout.

events.description: decelerating from high speed as approaching urban area

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on wet highway during heavy rain, approaching the city skyline

entered.detail: cyberpunk-style car interior with glowing pink neon displays and digital speedometer
metal safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated highway
futuristic high-rise buildings visible through the rain
tall lamp posts with linear lights spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed on a rain-soaked elevated highway. The futuristic dashboard glows with pink neon lights as the vehicle approaches the distant city skyline. Guardrails line both sides of the road under overcast, rainy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street in North Oak district

events.description: entering North Oak urban area from highway
beginning to follow a black sedan through city streets

multi-story commercial buildings with modern futuristic architecture
tall palm trees lining the urban street

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from highway to urban streets in the North Oak district. The vehicle follows a black sedan past commercial buildings and palm trees. Rain continues to fall heavily, reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot area off main road

events.description: turning left off main road into parking area to execute u-turn
completing u-turn maneuver in parking lot to head back toward main road

agents.ego_description: executing a u-turn maneuver in a parking lot area at low speed, following the black sedan

notable_agents.action: black sedan leading the way through the parking lot u-turn maneuver

entered.detail: open paved area allowing for vehicle maneuvering and turning
large advertising billboard with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: Making a detour into a parking lot to execute a U-turn. The vehicle follows the black sedan through the maneuver at low speed, with billboards visible in the background. The rain-slicked pavement reflects the surrounding lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with warehouses and retaining walls

events.description: passing other vehicles on the industrial road

agents.ego_description: driving along industrial road passing warehouses and concrete walls, accelerating to moderate speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan continuing ahead on the road toward the tunnel

entered.detail: large industrial buildings with flat roofs and minimal windows
tall concrete wall running alongside the road
illuminated advertising billboards with colorful displays
concrete tunnel portal with red warning lights and overhead signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through an industrial zone with warehouses on the left and concrete retaining walls on the right. The vehicle passes illuminated billboards and approaches a tunnel entrance. Other vehicles are visible on the road as the rain continues.

events.description: entering tunnel, switching from natural overcast to artificial fluorescent lighting
rain no longer falling on windshield inside sheltered tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel following the black sedan, illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights

notable_agents.action: black sedan ahead navigating the curved tunnel passage

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel walls with horizontal fluorescent lighting strips
smooth concrete tunnel walls with horizontal fluorescent lighting strips
fluorescent light strips mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Entering a well-lit concrete tunnel, transitioning from the rainy exterior to the sheltered interior. The artificial lighting creates a different atmosphere as the vehicle continues to follow the black sedan through the curved tunnel passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a high-speed highway journey into the sheltered confines of an urban tunnel. It begins on a rain-soaked elevated highway, where a pink neon dashboard glows against a backdrop of overcast skies and a distant city skyline. As the vehicle descends into the North Oak district, the open road shifts to urban streets lined with palm trees and commercial buildings, eventually slowing as the camera follows a black sedan through a U-turn in a rain-slicked parking lot. The scene then expands into an industrial zone characterized by warehouses and concrete retaining walls before turning toward a tunnel entrance. Finally, the vehicle glides from the heavy rain into the artificial light of a curved concrete tunnel, leaving the stormy exterior behind.
